title: Hub teaching discovery: path disambiguation + index-driven approach
description: Two corrections to hub wakeup teaching discovery. (1) PATH: The teachings repo is at {hub_path}/teachings_repo/framework/current/ — do NOT add a WAI-Hub/ prefix. When the hub node IS the hub_path, the repo lives at the hub root, not under WAI-Hub/. AI agents consistently make this mistake by prepending WAI-Hub/ when constructing the path. (2) DISCOVERY: Use teachings_repo/framework/index.json as the authoritative list of what teachings exist, then diff against WAI-Spoke/seed/ingest/processed/ to find new ones. Do NOT glob for .teaching files and count — counting before diffing against processed is fragile and causes false positives.
rationale: Every new hub setup will hit both of these bugs. The path confusion happens because AI agents expand ${HUB_PATH}/teachings_repo/... incorrectly by adding WAI-Hub/ as if the repo were an internal hub subfolder. The file-count approach causes chronic wakeup confusion about how many teachings are actually pending.

fix.discovery_approach: Read teachings_repo/framework/index.json for the canonical list. Check each id against WAI-Spoke/seed/ingest/processed/ filenames. Only surface ones not yet processed.
